en: I would hate having a combo with Chris Rock.
ko: 크리스 록이랑 같이 있으면 진짜 싫을 듯

en: He is one loud-ass black individual.
Matthew Broderick can eat a d**k he peaked at 17.
Kevin Bacon is what Ryan Reynolds would look like if he did a s**t ton of heroin.
ko: 케빈 베이컨은 라이언 레이놀즈가 헤로인을 많이 했다면 이렇게 생겼을 거예요.

en: Idris Elba is ugly. There. I said it. F**k you.
They should cast me in all of Dan Levy's parts, because I'm annoying and gay, but not
ko: 나한테 댄 레비 역할 다 줘야 해, 나도 짜증나고 게이인데

en: completely insufferable, and I'm also hotter than him.
ko: 완전히 참을 수 없고, 저가 그보다 더 매력적이에요.

en: Nothing says gay rights like this tweet.
ko: 이 트윗보다 동성애 권리를 더 잘 표현하는 건 없어요.

en: Kirsten Dunst looks like if Juul got cosmetic surgery, but then got hit by a bus the day
ko: 커스틴 던스트는 주울이 성형수술을 받고 버스에 치인 것처럼 보여요.

en: Andrew Garfield has fat people hands, or at least the hands of a creepy school custodian.
ko: 사람 손을 가졌어, 아니 적어도 누군가의 손처럼
